text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap talk about the
circumstances in which they were raised. Despite
both of them coming from underprivileged
backgrounds, their viewpoints couldn't be more
different.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap's strength comes from how full she has grown on the love from those around her, while Tamamo Cross's strength is born of hunger instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is the yin to Tamamo Cross's yang—an
alternate version of her. And that's precisely why
Oguri Cap triggers such an intense competitive
drive in her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Oguri Cap also considering Tamamo Cross
to be her one-and-only rival, she abandons the
Classic Triple Crown tour and announces her
intention to run in the autumn Tenno Sho.
